title: 70th Birthday Bhante Bodhidhamma's Life story
justification: This 70th birthday talk is by far the most comprehensive autobiographical account, covering Bhante's entire life journey from birth through Catholic upbringing, seminary expulsion, existential crisis, world travels, marriage, encounter with Buddhism, ordination, and establishment of Satipanya. It contains rich personal anecdotes, emotional depth, humor, and spiritual reflection that make it ideal as a chapter spine. The narrative arc is complete and the voice is distinctively personal and engaging.
summary: Bhante recounts his life story on his 70th birthday, from his dramatic birth in Italy through Catholic seminary, existential wandering, world travels, and eventual discovery of Buddhism leading to ordination. The talk weaves together personal struggles, spiritual awakenings, and the founding of Satipanya with characteristic humor and depth.

relevance.note: Complete life story from birth to becoming monk
